meta.description: Skill permission graph: skills mapped to authorized capabilities

nodes.label: audit:code
nodes.description: Analyze code patterns, module boundaries, coupling, and identify refactoring opportunities (READ-ONLY - query only)

nodes.label: audit:config
nodes.description: Audit Claude Code configuration files for deprecated capabilities and misconfigurations

nodes.label: audit:epics
nodes.description: Audit all epics and milestones for completion correctness (READ-ONLY - query only)

nodes.label: audit:full
nodes.description: Full comprehensive repository audit combining structure, code patterns, and health metrics (READ-ONLY - query only)

nodes.label: audit:milestone
nodes.description: Analyze milestone health and surface issues needing attention (READ-ONLY - query only)

nodes.label: audit:regression
nodes.description: Run regression audit for skills, hooks, and actions (runtime behavioral verification)

nodes.label: audit:structure
nodes.description: Analyze folder/file organization, project structure conventions, and architectural consistency (READ-ONLY - query only)

nodes.label: audit:ui-ux
nodes.description: Audit UI/UX design standard compliance — tokens, components, accessibility, responsive design, and style profile consistency (READ-ONLY with delegation)

nodes.label: delivery:audit
nodes.description: Validate GitHub issue tracking against actual PR deliveries (READ-ONLY - audit only)

nodes.label: issue:capture
nodes.description: Quick capture for bugs, features, and observations with intelligent triage

nodes.label: issue:checkout
nodes.description: Claim an issue for the current Claude instance to prevent parallel conflicts

nodes.label: issue:close
nodes.description: Close GitHub issue(s) using the repo-workflow agent (validates before closing)

nodes.description: Create a GitHub issue using the repo-workflow agent (enforces conventions)

nodes.label: issue:label
nodes.description: Apply or remove labels on GitHub issues using the repo-workflow agent

nodes.label: issue:locks
nodes.description: Show all currently checked-out issues across instances (READ-ONLY unless --clean flag)

nodes.label: issue:prioritize-4wm
nodes.description: Run the Four Wise Men decision framework to prioritize issues and reach consensus on scope, timing, need, and strategic fit (READ-ONLY - advisory only)

nodes.label: issue:release
nodes.description: Release a checked-out issue, removing the lock for other instances

nodes.label: issue:triage-bulk
nodes.description: Review all open issues in the active milestone and apply intelligent labeling and prioritization

nodes.label: issue:triage-single
nodes.description: Review and improve issue quality with suggested enhancements

nodes.description: Scaffold a new skill using framework templates

nodes.description: Quick health check for framework integration issues

nodes.description: Initialize a repository for use with the Claude Agent Framework (claude-tastic consumer repo variant)

nodes.label: local:review
nodes.description: Review existing CLAUDE.md after framework deployment and generate migration plan (READ-ONLY - query only)

nodes.label: merge:resolve

nodes.description: milestone:epic-decompose

nodes.label: ops:actions

nodes.label: ops:agents
nodes.description: Audit skills/agents/frameworks for format compliance and quality improvements

nodes.label: ops:metrics
nodes.description: Review agent performance metrics - token usage, execution timing, and model selection patterns (READ-ONLY - query only)

nodes.label: ops:models
nodes.description: Audit agent model configurations for cost and efficiency optimization

nodes.description: Visualize skill dependencies, primitive usage, and permission tier inheritance (READ-ONLY - query only)

nodes.description: Analyze dependency PRs for breaking changes and produce merge verdicts

nodes.description: Automated review-fix iteration loop until PR is approved or max iterations reached

nodes.description: Run all PR review agents locally and write findings to pr-status.json

nodes.description: Route PR review findings to the agents that wrote the code for fixes

nodes.description: Check current PR review status and display actionable summary

nodes.description: Promote dev branch to qa for QA validation

nodes.description: Validate release gates before deployment, ensuring quality and security standards are met
